description: One banana, 2 tsp peanut butter, and half a cup of oatmeal with a glass of milk.
200g chicken breast with 150g rice, 1 tsp butter, and 100g Greek yogurt.
A handful of walnuts and one apple.
Two scrambled eggs, one slice of whole wheat toast, and a small orange.
One cup of plain yogurt with half a cup of berries and 1 tbsp honey.
150g grilled salmon with one medium baked potato and steamed broccoli.
One turkey sandwich with lettuce, tomato, and a slice of cheese.
Half a cup of oats cooked with water, topped with one sliced banana.
2 boiled eggs, one cup cucumber slices, and one small pear.
180g lean beef with 120g mashed potatoes and green beans.
One cup cottage cheese with pineapple chunks and 10 almonds.
150g tofu stir fry with mixed vegetables and 100g rice.
One bowl lentil soup with one slice of whole grain bread.
One tuna wrap with lettuce, onion, and a spoon of yogurt dressing.
One cup chickpea salad with tomato, cucumber, and olive oil.
2 rice cakes with avocado spread and one boiled egg.
160g roasted chicken thigh with carrots and half a cup quinoa.
One smoothie with milk, banana, oats, and peanut butter.
One bowl pasta with tomato sauce and 30g grated parmesan.
One cup Greek yogurt with granola and one sliced kiwi.
